Hey, Ezra here with you with a breakdown of the iCOSA system as it relates to Boom by Cindy Joseph. So the first step in the iCOSA system is ideation. And then you have to create it, right? So the next step in the ICOSA system is creation. And for us, since this is an interview series, the creation starts with our copywriter, actually writing what's called a run of show.
